acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. ChairTime has a free forever tier with unlimited bookings for solo stylists. We make money from optional premium features, not commissions on your earnings. You keep 100% of what you charge clients.

mainEntity.name: Does ChairTime take a commission on bookings?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, never. Unlike Fresha and other platforms, ChairTime never takes a cut of your bookings. Zero commission, zero transaction fees on appointments.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to set up?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most stylists are ready to accept bookings within 10 minutes. Add your services, set your hours, share your booking link. That's it.
Yes. ChairTime is fully GDPR compliant. Your client data is encrypted, stored on EU servers, and belongs to you. We never sell data or contact your clients.

mainEntity.name: Can clients book when I'm busy or closed?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. Clients only see your available slots. You control your working hours, break times, and days off. Block time for lunch, holidays, or personal appointments—clients can't book those times.

mainEntity.name: What if I work in a salon and at home?

acceptedAnswer.text: ChairTime supports multiple locations. Set different availability for each place. Clients see where you're available when booking.

mainEntity.name: Can I export my client list?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Export your client data anytime as CSV. Your client relationships belong to you, not the platform.
Yes. Automatic email reminders go to clients before appointments (24 hours by default, customisable). SMS reminders available on paid plans.
ChairTime is a web app that works on any device. Add it to your phone's home screen for an app-like experience. Native apps are on the roadmap.

mainEntity.name: Can I cancel my account anytime?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. No contracts, no cancellation fees. Export your data first if you want, then cancel from settings. We don't hold your business hostage.

ChairTime is designed for independent stylists and small salons. If you need advanced inventory management, payroll for large teams, or complex multi-location corporate features, you may need enterprise software like Phorest.

mainEntity.name: Does ChairTime integrate with other software?

acceptedAnswer.text: ChairTime integrates with Google Calendar so appointments appear alongside your personal events. More integrations (Instagram booking button, payment processors) are on the roadmap.
